name: Story Manuscript
description: Long-form manuscript styling for fiction drafts and narrative editing.

preview.sampleText: Comfortable long-read rhythm for scenes, dialogue, and revision notes.

classes.h6: text-base font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-zinc-600 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-zinc-300 p-2 bg-zinc-100 text-left font-semibold text-zinc-900
classes.blockquote: my-6 border-l-4 border-indigo-300 bg-indigo-50 py-3 pl-5 italic text-zinc-700
classes.code: rounded bg-zinc-200 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-zinc-900
classes.pre: my-6 rounded-lg border border-zinc-300 bg-zinc-100 p-4 overflow-x-auto
